---
title: "Spring Buds: Counsels for the Young. Translated and abridged from the French, by E. L. E. B. With a preface by Charlotte M. Yonge."
---

## Spring Buds: Counsels for the Young. Translated and abridged from the French, by E. L. E. B. With a preface by Charlotte M. Yonge.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1883
**Genre:** Non-fiction: advice book (by another)
**Format:** Preface  to book

**Publisher:** London: J. Masters & Co., 78, New Bond Street

### Notes

E.L.E.B..is possibly CMY’s neighbour Ella L.E.Burlton.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
